name: origin-physical-ai
description: Origin Physical AI — the robot-readiness + agent-autonomy + RL-environment monorepo (Console, Passport, Cobra, Chronos, Factory).
comment:workspaces: chronos-ui is React 18 and is installed STANDALONE (its own node_modules) so its types don't collide with the React 19 apps under npm hoisting. The Makefile builds it separately. Switch to pnpm later for true isolation (see docs/MIGRATION.md).
